---
title: python base libraries
---

```{css css_custom, code=readLines("_css_custom.css"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r knitr_config, code=readLines("_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```

*********************************************************************

* https://docs.python.org/3/py-modindex.html  

*********************************************************************

## datetime

* https://docs.python.org/3/library/datetime.html  
* https://www.datacamp.com/community/tutorials/converting-strings-datetime-objects  

```{python}
from datetime import datetime
x = datetime.strptime("20190828", "%Y%m%d")
x.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
```

```{python}
from datetime import datetime
x = datetime.now()
x
x.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
```

*********************************************************************

## json

* https://docs.python.org/3/library/json.html  
* https://www.datacamp.com/community/tutorials/json-data-python  

```python
import json
```

*********************************************************************

## os

* https://docs.python.org/3/library/os.html  

```{python}
import os
os.path.expanduser('~')
os.getcwd()
os.popen("which python").read()
print(os.popen("which python").read())
```

*********************************************************************

## pickle

* https://docs.python.org/3/library/pickle.html  
* https://www.datacamp.com/community/tutorials/pickle-python-tutorial  

```python
import pickle
```

*********************************************************************

## random

```{python}
import random
random.randint(1, 10)
```


*********************************************************************

## re

* https://docs.python.org/3/library/re.html  
* https://www.datacamp.com/community/tutorials/python-regular-expression-tutorial  
* https://www.datacamp.com/community/tutorials/regular-expressions-clean-strings  

```python
import re
```

*********************************************************************

## subprocess

* https://docs.python.org/3/library/subprocess.html

```{python}
import subprocess
subprocess.getoutput("echo $(whoami)")
```

*********************************************************************

## sys

* https://docs.python.org/3/library/sys.html

```{python}
# print the path to the python environment
import sys
print(sys.prefix)
```

```python
# add something to end of the PATH
import sys
import os
sys.path.append('{}/github/how2/'.format(os.path.expanduser('~')))
from mysript import myfunction
```

```python
# system args passed in via terminal - always as strings
import sys
print(sys.argv[0])
print(sys.argv[1])
print(sys.argv)
```

*********************************************************************

## warnings

* https://docs.python.org/3/library/warnings.html

```python
# Hide warnings if there are any
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')
```
